artist.name: Elara Voss
artist.quote: In the code of chaos, I paint eternity

bio.short: Exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence, blockchain technology, and surrealist expression to create art that transcends physical boundaries
paragraphs: Elara Voss is a visionary digital artist whose work exists at the convergence of cutting-edge technology and timeless artistic expression. Born from the digital age, her creations challenge the boundaries between human creativity and artificial intelligence.

Each piece is a meditation on the nature of consciousness, reality, and the infinite possibilities that emerge when code becomes canvas. Her work has been featured in prestigious galleries worldwide and collected by prominent museums.
Through blockchain technology, Elara has pioneered new models of artistic ownership and community engagement, creating living artworks that evolve with their collectors.

timeline.title: Digital Awakening
timeline.description: First AI-generated artwork exhibited at Digital Dreams Festival

timeline.title: Blockchain Pioneer
timeline.description: Launched first NFT collection 'Fractal Visions' on Ethereum

timeline.title: Sotheby's Breakthrough
timeline.description: Sold $1M NFT 'Eternal Recursion' at Sotheby's Contemporary Art Auction

timeline.title: AR Innovation
timeline.description: Premiered interactive AR installation at Venice Biennale

timeline.title: Web3 Visionary
timeline.description: Founded 'Code Canvas' - decentralized art collective on Polygon

exhibitions.title: Venice Biennale 2023
exhibitions.description: Premiered 'Portal Visions' - an immersive AR experience exploring digital consciousness
